SEARCH
Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams

Enclosing interface:
PuzzlesAuth
public static interface PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams
    before(ZonedDateTime before)

  • Method Details

    • max

      PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams max(int max)
      Parameters:
      max - How many entries to download. Default all entries.

    • before

      PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams before(ZonedDateTime before)
      Parameters:
      before - Download entries before this timestamp. Defaults to now.

    • before

      default PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams before(UnaryOperator<ZonedDateTime> now)
      Parameters:
      now - Download entries before this timestamp. Example: now -> now.minusDays(5)

    • since

      PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams since(ZonedDateTime since)
      Parameters:
      since - Download entries since this timestamp.

    • since

      default PuzzlesAuth.PuzzleActivityParams since(UnaryOperator<ZonedDateTime> now)
      Parameters:
      now - Download entries since this timestamp. Example: now -> now.minusDays(5)
